title: Quantification of circulating microRNA using droplet digital PCR
author: Helle Glud Binderup
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.q8edzte

steps.title: use 5 ml of EDTA anticoagulated whole blood
steps.instruction: use 5 ml of EDTA anticoagulated whole blood

steps.title: centrifuge at 3000 g for 30...
steps.instruction: centrifuge at 3000 g for 30 minutes (acceleration 5, brake 6, temperature 18 °C)

steps.title: transfer plasma phase to cryo-tubes, leaving approximately 0
steps.instruction: transfer plasma phase to cryo-tubes, leaving approximately 0.5 ml of plasma on top of the buffy coat

steps.title: Nucleospin®miRNA Plasma Macherey-Nagal Catalog #740971
steps.instruction: Nucleospin®miRNA Plasma Macherey-Nagal Catalog #740971.50

steps.title: use 300 µL platelet-poor plasma
steps.instruction: use 300 µL platelet-poor plasma

steps.title: after addition of isopropanol, add also...
steps.instruction: after addition of isopropanol, add also 5 µL spike-in (cel-miR-39, 2.75 × 10 −12 M)

steps.title: perform the optional DNA digest
steps.instruction: perform the optional DNA digest

steps.title: TaqMan®MicroRNA Reverse Transcription Kit Applied Biosystems...
steps.instruction: TaqMan®MicroRNA Reverse Transcription Kit Applied Biosystems (ThermoFisher Scientific) Catalog #4366597 20X TaqMan MicroRNA Assay Thermo Fisher Scientific Catalog #4440887

steps.title: Prepare RT master mix
steps.instruction: Prepare RT master mix: %s %s *add 10-20% excess volume **add water to a total reaction volume of 15 µL (including microRNA and RT-primers, see step 7) Mix gently and place on ice Remember to include a RT-negative sample (no template) It is also a good idea to include a RT-positive sample (a microRNA-sample included in all runs)

steps.title: For each RT reaction, combine RT...
steps.instruction: For each RT reaction, combine RT master mix with 2 µL of purified microRNA in a 0.2 µL polypropylene reaction tube (the volume of RT master mix is dependent on the number of RT-primers, see step 7) Keep on ice

steps.title: Prepare RT primer mix
steps.instruction: Prepare RT primer mix: Add for each RT reaction 0.75 µL 20x RT primer from each microRNA assay set Example with two microRNA assays: %s %s Component Volume per 15 µL reaction* 20x RT specific primer #1 0.75 µL 20x RT specific primer #2 0.75 µL Total volume 1.5 µL** *add 10-20% excess volume **when using two microRNA assays the volume of water needed in step 5 is 8.66 µL for each reaction, and the volume of master mix added in step 6 is 11.5 µL Mix gently

steps.title: Add the appropiate volume of RT...
steps.instruction: Add the appropiate volume of RT primer mix to the reaction tubes prepared in step 6 Mix gently and incubate on ice for 5 minutes

steps.title: Transfer the reaction tubes to a...
steps.instruction: Transfer the reaction tubes to a termocycler Incubate at 16 °C for 30 min, at 42 °C for 30 min and at 85 °C for 5 min.

steps.title: Continue immediately to the PCR amplification...
steps.instruction: Continue immediately to the PCR amplification or store the RT-reaction in -20 °C.

steps.title: 20X TaqMan MicroRNA Assay Thermo Fisher...
steps.instruction: 20X TaqMan MicroRNA Assay Thermo Fisher Scientific Catalog #4440887 ddPCR Supermix for probes (no dUTP) Bio-Rad Laboratories Catalog #1863024

steps.title: Prepare ddPCR reaction mix
steps.instruction: Prepare ddPCR reaction mix: %s %s *add 10-20% excess volume Mix gently

steps.title: Dilute each of the RT-reactions (cDNAs)...
steps.instruction: Dilute each of the RT-reactions (cDNAs) 1:10 with nucleace free water (e.g. 2 µL cDNA + 18 µL water) Combine 45.4 µL of ddPCR reaction mix with 2.6 µL of diluted RT-reaction (cDNA) in a 96 well plate

steps.title: Transfer plate to termocycler Incubate in...
steps.instruction: Transfer plate to termocycler Incubate in 95 °C for 5 minutes Proceed with 44 cycles of 95 °C for 15 sec and 60 °C for 60 sec. Final incubation in 98 ºC for 10 min Cool to 4 °C

steps.title: ddPCR analysis is performed with QX100...
steps.instruction: ddPCR analysis is performed with QX100 Droplet Reader and QuantaSoft Software

steps.title: DG32™ Automated Droplet Generator Cartridges Bio-Rad...
steps.instruction: DG32™ Automated Droplet Generator Cartridges Bio-Rad Laboratories Catalog #1864108 Automated Droplet Generation Oil for Probes Bio-Rad Laboratories Catalog #1864110 (AutoDG, 1864101, Automated Droplet Generator from BioRad)

steps.title: Transfer 22 µL of the reaction...
steps.instruction: Transfer 22 µL of the reaction mixture into each of two wells on an empty 96 well plate Heat sealing Transfer plate to the AutoDG The AutoDG transfers 20 µL from each well to a GD32 cartidge for droplet generation Heat sealing of output plate

steps.title: QuantaSoft Software 1
steps.instruction: QuantaSoft Software 1.7 http://www.bio-rad.com/en-dk/sku/1864011-quantasoft-software-regulatory-edition?ID=1864011

steps.title: Normalization is performed by calculating the...
steps.instruction: Normalization is performed by calculating the relative concentration of target miRNA and cel-miR-39
